action_items.title: 2026 City Council Referral Prioritization Process Using Re-Weighted Range Voting (RRV)
action_items.recommendation: (1) Review the City Council raw scores for all outstanding City Council referrals; (2) Approve the removal of referrals that have been nominated for removal by the Council; and (3) Direct the City Manager to run the ranking algorithm and return to Council with a final ranked list of referrals for adoption.
